sourceOfTruth: This file is the canonical spread manifest for The Echo Ogre production workflow. Beat README files and exported prompt packages should be checked against these records.
printTarget: KDP paperback production through Photoshop cleanup and InDesign layout.
qualityGates: Image adds story value beyond the caption
Main action reads at thumbnail size
Character acting is specific and on-model
Maplewood Terrace / Sparkle Shield world details are present
There is a second-look detail for rereads
Spread rhythm differs from neighboring spreads

spreads.title: The Echo Ogre Appears
spreads.storyText: Purple lights flicker. The Echo Ogre copies every brave choice.
spreads.objective: Introduce wonder, danger, and the rule that strong feelings echo back.

spreads.title: Choose a First Helper
spreads.canonicalDecision: Use the current interactive story-flow version: outdoor first-helper choice on Maplewood Terrace. The older kitchen/theme-stated matrix row is historical planning context only.
spreads.storyText: The team must choose who helps first.
spreads.objective: Frame the first decision as calm, pause, or listening.
spreads.primaryRead: Three helper choices are emotionally distinct at a glance: breathe, pause, or listen.
spreads.emotionalTurn: The family moves from surprise into intentional choice.
spreads.readerDiscovery: Children can spot that each helper offers a different kind of strength.
spreads.withheld: Do not reveal which choice creates the strongest repair yet.
spreads.avoid: Avoid making the choice feel like a fight menu or a video-game attack screen.

conflicts.issue: Older planning row names Beat02 as kitchen/theme-stated/healthy.
conflicts.decision: Canonical spread record supersedes the old matrix row for EO-SP02.

spreads.title: Fast Hands
spreads.storyText: Cash rushed in. The Echo Ogre copied him louder.
spreads.objective: Show that fast action without awareness makes the problem bigger.

spreads.title: Watching the Pattern
spreads.storyText: Kairo watched quietly. Calm made the Echo Ogre softer.
spreads.objective: Make stillness feel active and heroic.

spreads.title: Dad Kneels Down
spreads.storyText: Dad said sorry. The Echo Ogre listened.
spreads.objective: Show adult repair as strength, not weakness.

spreads.title: Noticing What Happened
spreads.storyText: Cash slowed down. Hard moments can still be repaired.
spreads.objective: Turn a mistake into a learnable, repairable moment.

spreads.title: Calm In, Calm Out
spreads.storyText: The Echo Ogre echoed everything, even quiet.
spreads.objective: Make pattern recognition visible through bubbles and ripples.

spreads.title: A Breath Together
spreads.storyText: The family breathed together. The street grew softer.
spreads.objective: Give readers a clear body-based calming tool.

spreads.title: The Ogre Watches
spreads.storyText: Something still wasn't right. The Echo Ogre watched.
spreads.objective: Shift from action to psychological suspense: kindness paused the imbalance but did not fully heal it, and the Ogre is learning.
spreads.primaryRead: The Echo Ogre watches quietly instead of attacking.
spreads.readerDiscovery: The environment hints that one repaired moment is not the same as whole-community healing.

spreads.title: When the Neighborhood Forgot
spreads.storyText: The music faded again. Bubble Boy whispered, "We didn't fix it."
spreads.objective: Create the emotional low point: one kind moment paused the imbalance, but true repair takes sustained relationships.
spreads.primaryRead: The neighborhood itself becomes the emotional subject.
spreads.readerDiscovery: Children can notice which neighborhood systems pause, fade, or wait for repair.

spreads.title: Bubble Shield
spreads.objective: Show protection as calm boundaries, not aggression.

spreads.title: Repair Words
spreads.storyText: Sorry opened a door that shouting could not.
spreads.objective: Make apology concrete and emotionally safe.

spreads.title: Fast Hands Ending
spreads.storyText: Rushing made the Echo Ogre bigger, not better.
spreads.objective: Deliver a clear consequence without shame.

spreads.title: Bubble Pause Ending
spreads.storyText: Quiet attention turned wild color into soft bubbles.

spreads.title: Sparkle Shield Ending
spreads.storyText: The Echo Ogre stopped echoing fear and echoed kindness.
spreads.objective: Give the true ending a warm, triumphant family finish.
spreads.primaryRead: The whole family stands in restored warmth with the Echo Ogre as a guardian of care.
spreads.readerDiscovery: A second look should reveal the neighborhood systems glowing together again.

spreads.title: Family Practice Page
spreads.objective: Close with a repeatable family practice for readers.
